title: oenothera biennis f. muricata
intro: Oenothera biennis f. muricata, also known as evening primrose, is a biennial flowering plant native to North America. It is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with medicinal properties, which has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting cardiovascular health. Evening primrose is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, oils, and teas, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
